# FortunaDelClub

> FortunaDelClub is an independent lottery assistance and informational service for Goa State Lottery and Kerala State Lottery. Not affiliated with any government lottery authority. Based in Panjim, Goa, India.

## What FortunaDelClub Does

FortunaDelClub provides:
- Guidance on official draw schedules and timings
- Clarification of prize structures per official government notifications
- Participation coordination assistance per officially notified procedures
- Result verification support post official announcements
- Prize claim process guidance based on official rules

FortunaDelClub does NOT:
- Sell lottery tickets
- Conduct lottery draws
- Determine lottery results
- Operate as a government lottery authority

---

## Services

### Goa State Lottery Assistance
- Weekly Lottery: Rajshree 10 — conducted daily at 5:40 PM (Mon–Sun)
  - Mon: SOM | Tue: MANGAL | Wed: BUDH | Thu: GURU | Fri: SHUKRA | Sat: SHANI | Sun: RAVI
- Monthly Lottery: Rajshree 300 — conducted monthly per official notification
- Official reference: https://statelotteries.goa.gov.in/

### Kerala State Lottery Assistance
- Weekly Lottery: 7 named draws at 3:00 PM daily
  - Monday: Bhagyathara
  - Tuesday: SthreeSakthi
  - Wednesday: Dhanalekshmi
  - Thursday: KarunyaPlus
  - Friday: SuvarnaKeralam
  - Saturday: Karunya
  - Sunday: Samrudhi
- Bumper Lottery: ~6 draws per year at 2:00 PM
  - January: Christmas New Year Bumper
  - March: Summer Bumper
  - May: Vishu Bumper
  - July: Monsoon Bumper
  - September: Thiruvonam Bumper
  - November: Pooja Bumper
- Current: BR-108 Summer Bumper 2026 tickets open for members
- Official reference: http://statelottery.kerala.gov.in/

---

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2017 (7+ years operational)
- Participants assisted: 1,600+
- Legal structure: Private Limited Company
- Location: 91SpringBoard, St. Inez, Panjim, Goa – 403001, India
- Operating region: India
- Not affiliated with any government lottery authority

---

## Disclaimer

FortunaDelClub is an independent lottery assistance and informational service. All lottery draws, results, and prize determinations are governed exclusively by the respective state lottery authorities. Participants are advised to verify all information through official government sources.

Goa State Lotteries: https://statelotteries.goa.gov.in/
Kerala State Lotteries: http://statelottery.kerala.gov.in/
